raw_consumer_statement:
I am submitting this complaint regarding XXXX XXXX handling of transactions on my account that involved illegal or prohibited online casino and wagering activity but were consistently categorized as ordinary consumer purchases. This systematic miscategorization misrepresented the true nature of the transactions and interfered with accurate account monitoring. 

Each disputed transaction was posted under benign consumer categories such as XXXX, XXXX XXXX, or similar retail classifications, despite the underlying merchants operating illegal or unlicensed online casino or wagering platforms. These categories were materially inaccurate and misleading, obscuring the true nature and risk of the transactions. 

XXXX XXXX relied on these incorrect categories during the dispute process to deny or limit investigations, treating the charges as legitimate consumer purchases rather than evaluating the true nature and legality of the underlying activity. As a result, dispute investigations were neither reasonable nor complete. 

An attached exhibit documents each disputed transaction, the merchant involved, the category assigned by XXXX XXXX, and why that category is inaccurate and deceptive. The miscategorization was not isolated but occurred repeatedly across multiple merchants and transactions, indicating a systemic failure in transaction classification and dispute review. 

I am requesting CFPB review of whether XXXX XXXX transaction categorization and dispute practices constitute unfair or deceptive acts or practices and whether corrective and remedial action is warranted.
